title: poa aspera
intro: Poa aspera, also known as rough meadow-grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Poa aspera include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation method.
